title: Non-record: Compact 12x384 1xH100 10m
body:
Adds one non-record submission folder under records/track_non_record_16mb with README, submission.json, train.log, and train_gpt.py.

Notes:
- Run performed on 1x H100 due to limited compute budget while awaiting grant-backed 8xH100 runs.
- This is a size/quality tradeoff experiment (smaller artifact, lower score than same-session baseline).
- Folder is self-contained and script compiles/runs from within the records folder.
